summary: Tested WhatsApp Settings new features: Default Group selector, Auto Daily Report schedule, and SendToGroupDialog auto-selection. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Settings new features fully tested. Default Group dropdown works with refresh button. Auto Daily Report toggle appears when group is selected, with time picker. SendToGroupDialog auto-selects default group from settings. Backend scheduler 'WhatsApp Group scheduler started' confirmed in logs.

frontend_ui.Settings > Messaging > Default WhatsApp: PASS - Shows group list with refresh button
frontend_ui.Settings > Messaging > Auto Daily Report: PASS - Appears when default group is selected, shows ON/OFF
frontend_ui.Settings > Messaging > Time picker: PASS - Appears when Auto toggle is ON
frontend_ui.Settings > Messaging > Save WhatsApp Set: PASS - Saves all fields including schedule settings
frontend_ui.SendToGroupDialog auto-selects default g: PASS - Opens with default group pre-selected
